hero.name: Evan Saleck
hero.title: Full-Stack Developer Apprentice

projects.page_description: A selection of projects I've built and contributed to.

cheval.title: Hotel Management Software
cheval.description: Software for managing a hotel, from booking to billing, including room and staff management.

docker.title: Docker-based application for data extraction and PDF generation
docker.description: Docker test project for creating isolated and reproducible development and production environments. The application extracts data from a database, processes it, and outputs it in PDF format for easy analysis.

portfolio2.title: Portfolio V2
portfolio2.description: Complete redesign of my personal portfolio using Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS for an improved user experience and optimized performance.

bot.title: Discord Server Management Bot
bot.description: Discord bot developed in Node.js using the discord.js library, designed to help server administrators manage members, moderate discussions, and automate common tasks. (Work in progress)

klory.title: Klory
klory.description: Calorie and meal management application offering an intuitive interface to track daily calories consumed and burned. (Work in progress)

about.page_description: Learn more about me and my skills.
about.intro_text: I am a full-stack developer passionate about clean code, polished user experiences, and solving complex problems. I particularly enjoy tackling technical challenges and collaborating with others to create innovative solutions. Furthermore, low-level languages are particularly interesting to me.
